actual_current_surface_status: bounded-support / WZ response harness implementation plan
exact_next_action: Choose whether to actually implement the EW same-source W/Z correlator harness as a new production workstream.  Until then, continue FH/LSZ chunks and the source-Higgs/Schur/rank-one routes.

implementation_work_units.deliverable: Define the same-source EW gauge/Higgs action block used by the W/Z response run.
required_rows_or_certificates: SU(2)xU(1) or retained-equivalent gauge-sector action on the Cl(3)/Z3 substrate
scalar source s coupled to the canonical Higgs radial direction, not to H_unit
same-source-coordinate certificate tying this source to the top FH source
firewall certificate excluding observed W/Z/top/y_t selectors and Ward/H_unit authority

implementation_work_units.deliverable: Measure W/Z correlators at negative, zero, and positive source shifts.
required_rows_or_certificates: fit windows or effective-mass plateaus with jackknife/bootstrap errors

implementation_work_units.deliverable: Fit dE_top/ds and dM_W/ds or dM_Z/ds on matched configurations.
required_rows_or_certificates: no use of static dM_W/dh as dM_W/ds

implementation_work_units.claim_status_after_done: identity support; not closure until gate passes
implementation_work_units.deliverable: Prove the measured W/Z response and top response are on the same canonical-Higgs pole sector.
required_rows_or_certificates: orthogonal neutral top-coupling null direction removed or measured
retained-route/proposal gate still false until all checks pass

implementation_work_units.deliverable: Write the future W/Z measurement row file and feed the existing builder/gate stack.

proposal_allowed_reason: Implementation planning is support only; no production W/Z rows or identity certificates exist.

shortcut_rejections.reason: It supplies dM_W/dh after canonical H is assumed, not measured dM_W/ds under the PR230 source.
The guard records missing W/Z rows; it is not a W/Z correlator or mass-response measurement.
shortcut_rejections.shortcut: QCD top-correlator harness W/Z absent guard

shortcut_rejections.reason: The ratio still reads y_t times an unknown top/gauge source-overlap factor.
shortcut_rejections.shortcut: generic W/Z slope without sector identity

shortcut_rejections.reason: External values are comparators only and cannot select the source overlap.
shortcut_rejections.shortcut: observed W/Z, top, y_t, or g2 selectors

shortcut_rejections.reason: This re-enters the audited matrix-element renaming trap.

strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
does not write or synthesize W/Z measurement rows
does not treat static EW gauge-mass algebra as dM_W/ds
does not treat the QCD harness absent guard as evidence
does not set kappa_s = 1, k_top = k_gauge, c2 = 1, or Z_match = 1
does not use H_unit, yt_ward_identity, observed targets, alpha_LM, plaquette, or u0
verdict: The W/Z fallback route is now reduced to concrete engineering work units.  Current PR230 still has no same-source W/Z mass response rows: the QCD top harness only emits an absent guard, the repo-wide audit finds no hidden W/Z harness, and the builder/gate remain open.  The plan names the required EW action, W/Z correlator mass fits, matched top/WZ covariance, sector-identity certificates, and builder integration.  It does not write measurement rows or authorize retained/proposed-retained wording.
